itemListElement.reviewBody: It is actually affiliated with CISCE, this school is absolute fraud school. Please consider my review before seeking for admission because I am already taking my child out of this school

Hi, I'm Lokesh, a 12th passout of this school from the 2021 batch. I believe I'm eligible to provide a review about this school, having studied here for 15 years.

This school lacks a playground, and in the name of sports, it only organizes an annual sports day once every 2 years; that was not held last time due to COVID. Regarding indoor games, it only has a chess competition once every 2 years. The school also organizes a cricket tournament, but very rarely, like once every 4 years during my time.

Here, students from class 9 are into party politics; they attend michils and rallies. They brag about calling in 20-30 boys for every little fight 😂. Cigarettes 🚬 and alcohol are common among a few percent of students (not inside the school premises, of course 😂), but yes, you will find students smoking cigarettes in school uniform.

Teachers and faculty - in this school, primary session teachers are average to decent, meaning they are not good, but also not bad. The worst condition is with secondary session teachers, specifically in classes 9th and 10th. Yes, exceptions are there; a few teachers are good, no doubt. But many teachers just show their faces to students so they can get their salary; they have zero intentions of actually teaching something to the students. They treat students like humans treat animals, not physically but in behavior, being rude and arrogant, wanting no complaints. Some teachers also grab students' collars for small mistakes to maintain their so-called "khauf" in the school. And yes, there are teachers who want students to join their private tuitions, saying they would pass them in exams with extra marks. There are legendary teachers like Doraemon 😂 (CPS students would recognize him), and a few others give the complete question paper to students in their private tuitions 😂. So, the first rule of joining this school in the secondary section when you're weak in studies is to take private tuitions from all school teachers and figure out who gives the complete question paper before the exam 😂(like Doraemon).

Now, about the higher-secondary, teachers are again average to decent, meaning they are better than secondary but still not worth it, except a few like RK Mishra for Hindi, Kaushal Kumar, and barely 1-2 more from the commerce and arts side.

This school previously had many good teachers like Naveen sir, Shyon sir, Lipika mam, Mighty sir, and many others, but they left. Also, new teachers who are good at teaching barely teach for 3-4 months max and then leave. The reason is simple; they don't get the respect and regard they deserve for their hard work from both students and teachers or school authorities. Among the remaining, only 20 percent are worth calling decent teachers; the rest are there to mark their presence and take their salary at the end of the month.

Slangs and abusive words are common among students from class 7 onwards. Go for it if you don't want an English medium school on a low budget or want to do self-study and don't want to go to school every day. It's better than other schools in the area but not up to the mark compared to other decent English medium schools in the city.

Today, when I look back, the only soft corner arises in my heart is for the moments I had spent with my friends and not of the teachers, sports, teaching methods, or anything else.

Not so good school for new admission directly in primary section. Management always support the parents and students those are read from pre primary. Even If the old student or parents make a fake complain school take action against new comers without any avidence, and if you goes to management for this reason thay told your child have picichologic
problem.Teachers and management does not hear anything from you,thay always shown that are right and you have to follow whichever thay are told.
I'm one of the student of Calcutta Public School.Its one of the best faculty I have ever experienced.The teachers are too helpful.
Calcutta Public School is a second home for students where they are nurtured by love, care, knowledge and confidence. Here they develop in a holistic way.
It's extremely grateful to have the opportunity to be a part of the CPS family.
Excellent faculty.Good co-operation and support from the management and all the teachers.
Best school with technology based education..

Great place to explore your capabilities and potential  as teachers as well as students . Make it the first preference for betterment of your child's future undoubtedly. Quality education alongwith modernized curriculum with practical activities is provided to students here.

I am associated with CALCUTTA PUBLIC SCHOOLas an assistant teacher sinces 2 yrs. I am very happy working here. All of us are like family. I am extremely happy to be the part of this esteemed organization.
